name: Shrimp Etouffee
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat half the butter in a kettle; sauté onions, celery, bell peppers, garlic, and green onions until soft.
2. Add lemon juice, tomato puree, soup, mushrooms, and water; simmer.
3. Sauté shrimp in remaining butter on medium heat; add to vegetables and simmer for 10 to 15 minutes.
4. Blend cornstarch with 1/2 cup water; stir into the shrimp mixture.
5. Cook until heated through, about 10 minutes.
6. Adjust seasoning if needed; serve over hot cooked rice.
